notes: All 9 responses are substantively near-identical and uniformly strong: every response correctly identifies all 6 components (with correct colors/shapes), both protocol labels (HTTPS, gRPC), and the 5 connections. The single universal miss is the dangling/phantom third gRPC line splitting off from the API Gateway and going nowhere — none of the 9 mention it, suggesting a systematic perceptual blind spot rather than a per-sample failure. No response commits any hallucination (the implied DB-protocol notes are correctly hedged as assumptions). The only response with a real error is Q3.5-9B|t0.7|rep0, which incorrectly states the Worker Queue gRPC line is unlabeled. Slight edge to t0.4|rep1 and t0.7|rep1 for richer, well-organized detail without sacrificing accuracy.
